title: DINZ Velvet Exporter Guidebook
summary: The DINZ Velvet Exporter Guidebook covers the requirements and procedures for exporting deer velvet from New Zealand to Korea and other Asian markets. Topics: Korea import regulatory requirements and MFDS approval procedures; velvet grading and product classification standards; export documentation and customs declaration requirements; quarantine inspection and phytosanitary certificate requirements; market entry channels (pharmaceutical, food ingredient, direct export).
